title: Eva 30 Release Date Confirmation
wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.0 Release Date Confirmation Post by CobraVerde601 » Wed Mar 28, 2012 12:23 pm Im traveling to Japan this year and figured why not do it when the new Eva movie comes out and watch it there. Im trying to figure out how reliable is that date listed on IMDB of October 13 2012 as the release date. So far its the only site with an exact date where as Wiki and other sites till have it listed as TBA or fall 2012. I want to pull the trigger and buy my flight tickets but im worried of dropping the cash and the date being different. Has anyone heard or seen anything that can confirm this 10/12 date for release?? your help is appreciated.

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 28, 2012 12:25 pm There's no source for it. I'm waiting for the release date as well so I can book my tickets.

[]: Post by CobraVerde601 » Wed Mar 28, 2012 12:40 pm yeah i was trying to figure out where the heck they got that date from. The imdb site was updated recently so its gotta be somewhere.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Mar 28, 2012 3:57 pm If that's true then it makes mid-October the most incredible cinematic week of all time. Paul Thomas Anderson's The Master on Oct 12 and Eva 3.0 on Oct 13? Damn.

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Mar 28, 2012 4:36 pm I won't be able to to anything like fly to Japan to see 3.0 this year. Maybe FINAL, maybe FINAL....

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Mar 28, 2012 5:06 pm I was excite. Now I am disappoint. Let's not make any more of these confirmation threads until it's legit.
